steps.title: Story Graph Tutorial
steps.body:
This tutorial covers the story graph editor — DJ Engine's node-based narrative system.

You'll learn how to create dialogue, add choices, and connect nodes into a branching story.

Click Next to begin.

steps.title: Open the Story Graph
steps.body:
Switch to the Story Graph view using the view selector in the menu bar.

This step completes automatically when you switch views.

steps.title: Select a Node
steps.body:
Click on any node in the graph to select it.

The inspector on the right will show the node's properties — speaker, text, and connections.

This step completes automatically when you select a node.

steps.title: Edit in the Inspector
steps.body:
With a node selected, the inspector shows its editable fields:

- Dialogue nodes: Speaker ID, text, portrait, next node
- Choice nodes: Prompt text and option targets
- Branch nodes: Flag conditions with true/false paths

Explore the fields, then click Done to finish.
